idea.title: Fairy Ring
idea.hook: Drop spores into a quiet forest grid and watch each bloom into an expanding ring of mushrooms — time your placements so the rings overlap and merge for combo multipliers before your pouch runs dry.
idea.prototype: 9x9 top-down forest with scattered trees/rocks. Each turn place 1 spore (pouch of ~8, tuned to 5 for losability). A seeded spore grows a fairy ring that expands outward one tile per subsequent turn; rings that touch MERGE for a combo multiplier. A ring tile hitting a tree/rock dies and breaks that chain. Goal: reach a coverage/score target on the daily seed. Controls: tap a tile to seed, tap GROW to advance a turn.
idea.mutation_of: Telegram digest 'chill mushroom forest, no quests' (Mushroom Simulator Coop) + free vegetation assets (baxxstudio/4606, unityassets2/416)
idea.why_novel: Expanding-ring placement where the skill is timing overlaps for merges — a spatial growth-and-chain mechanic, not the bloom-spread of Bacteria Bloom nor any merge-by-collision. Calm organic theme the portfolio lacks, with combo timing as the real depth.
idea.lose_condition: You exhaust the spore pouch (or every ring dies against obstacles) before hitting the coverage target.
